query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Warm golden and amber light streaks radiate outward against a solid black background, forming an irregular, branching pattern reminiscent of natural organic structures or reflected illumination on water.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Warm golden and amber light streaks blur and smear through deliberate motion, dissolving into an abstract pattern against blackness; the intentional blur and accidental-feeling, poorly framed composition create an energy of casual snapshot spontaneity, with the subject unrecognizable and secondary to streaked gesture and color.
